com.societegenerale.failover.core.scanner.FailoverScanner

Packages that use FailoverScanner
Package
Description
com.societegenerale.failover.configuration
Spring Boot auto-configuration for the failover framework.
com.societegenerale.failover.core.report
Reporting and metrics publication for the failover lifecycle.
com.societegenerale.failover.core.scanner
Classpath scanner that discovers @Failover-annotated methods at startup.

  • Uses of FailoverScanner in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FailoverScanner
    FailoverAutoConfiguration.failoverScanner(FailoverProperties failoverProperties)
    Registers a scanner that locates all @Failover-annotated methods in the configured package.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FailoverReporter

    Creates the failover reporter bean that publishes a startup summary.
